title: Mushin Heat Wave
lead: Mushin is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.17. The city's heat wave has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Mushin are extreme, with a heat wave that is significantly above the normal temperature range. 
 The high temperature is causing a significant increase in cooling degree days (CDD), which is currently at 10.1 GG, while the heating degree days (HDD) is at 0.0 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 77% and the wind speed is at 12.3 km/h, making the heat feel even more oppressive.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
